description: Zanfi CMS lite 1.1 allows remote attackers to obtain the full path of the web server via direct requests without required arguments to (1) adm_pages.php, (2) corr_pages.php, (3) del_block.php, (4) del_page.php, (5) footer.php, (6) home.php, and others.
